import { getEntityCache, type GoblEntityData } from "gobl-utils-ts";
import CurrencyBase from "./base/CurrencyBase";

export default class Currency extends CurrencyBase {
	constructor(data?: GoblEntityData) {
		super(data, "Currency", Currency.PREFIX, [...Currency.COLUMNS]);
	}

	public static fromCache(key: string): Currency | undefined {
		const cache = getEntityCache<Currency>("Currency");
		return cache && cache.get(key);
	}

	//====================================================
	//=	Your custom implementation goes here
	//====================================================
}
